ac:anchor="Creating palettes for custom symbolic view definitions"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[create a custom view palette]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></span> within the body of the view definition.</li><li data-uuid="f2707b21-288a-4fb0-b799-44dc703e5a4d"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span><br /><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="954b0db7-4aeb-4978-8a86-cfa4c049770e"><ac:rich-text-body><p>The new view definition becomes available <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">in the<span> </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[View Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> once you:</span></p><ul><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Creating view templates for custom templated commands"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Creating View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Create a view template for a custom templated command]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Add the </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Adding commands to the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Creating View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[custom templated command to the View Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. This requires you to <ac:link><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[customize or create a View Creation dialog customization]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </span></li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="ac52faf4-2a1b-4b92-ac5e-65a9c42e9b9a"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom symbolic view definitions' {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// package for the custom symbolic view definition(s)</span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">   private</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">import </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Palette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">::*</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">   <u>view</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span>'Requirements View'<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span></u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"> // <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">new custom symbolic view definition 'Requirements View' subclassifying </span>'bsv', i.e., <em>'Base Symbolic View' </em>definition</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">       // specify the view palette here</span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">   </span>}<br /></span>}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3><span>Creating palettes for custom symbolic view definitions</span></h3><p>To create palettes for custom symbolic view definitions</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="5bc73da9-4829-4341-b014-e81645757d3e">Within the body of the view definition element of the new symbolic view definition, redefine the <em>baseViewPalette </em>inherited from the <em>Base Symbolic View</em> definition.</li><li data-uuid="412ef32a-2f3d-4063-9dc8-2529a8d30b9f">Specify button categories by doing any of the following:<ol><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Removing inherited button categories"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Remove inherited button categories]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Adding custom button categories"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Add custom button categories]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> </li></ol></li><li data-uuid="ec6f71ba-1335-4cf9-9098-64f153a23236"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f9223faa-0c80-44cf-af4a-6cdb8d5ce433"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new custom symbolic view definition 'Requirements View'<br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    <u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {     <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// redefines the <em>baseViewPalette</em> inherited from the <em>Base Symbolic View</em> definition. The custom palette now inherits Selection, Tools, and Common button categories</span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">        // specify button categories<span> here</span></span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}<br /></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Managing button categories in custom symbolic view palettes</h3><p>The procedures in this subsection explain how to manage inherited and custom button categories and their attributes.</p><h4>Removing inherited button categories</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To remove inherited button categories</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="520c97cc-5516-4917-99fd-f8cb8fd51722"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the part element redefining <em>baseViewPalette.</em></span></li><li data-uuid="a6db4cdb-169a-4c1d-bddd-5c5d380c8dff"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name (optional), and then redefine the button category you want to remove.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="69a869db-c56f-47bc-9fb5-dd9e448a09bf"><ac:rich-text-body><p>The button categories that are inherited from the <em><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">baseViewPalette</span></em> are <em>selectionCategory</em>, <em>toolsCategory</em>, and <em>commonCategory</em>. You can find them in the <em>DS_Views::ViewPalettes </em>package. You can also find the button categories in the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Custom symbolic view definitions" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[General button categories table]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="41122608-8328-42cb-b9b6-a806d5aa075a">Set the redefining button category's multiplicity to zero.</li><li data-uuid="3c66e14e-5aa1-4660-a482-26bb6bca5e41"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="931651bd-cb55-4752-98f0-162aa5b32ecb"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {     <br /></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        <u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; toolsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"> [0];</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// unnamed part redefines <em>toolsCategory </em>inherited via <em>baseViewPalette, </em>specifying the redefining button category's multiplicity to zero to remove it</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Adding custom button categories</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To add custom button categories</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="4aa7eeca-f25c-4e9e-bc8d-24da724e0099"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the element redefining <em>baseViewPalette.</em></span></li><li data-uuid="bfe6f984-9ca9-4c94-be8f-eae1bdd37655"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name, and then subset <em>buttonCategories</em>.</span></li><li data-uuid="d7b0e2c8-2ea5-4de6-b41e-98f680ac80e5">Within the new button category's body, do any of the following:<ol><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Specifying attributes for custom or inherited button categories"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Specify the button category attributes]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</li><li><ac:link ac:anchor="Managing buttons in button categories"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Specify the button category buttons]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </li></ol></li><li data-uuid="5bfacd96-f523-4cbb-a993-d0818e4f63a8"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="e8f6bcc3-35bd-4427-934c-ead5736f2ad9"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        <u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><u>buttonCategories</u>; <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new button category instance</span></span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Specifying attributes for custom or inherited button categories</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To specify attributes for custom or inherited button categories</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="1d067d54-5769-4531-9ae9-86b3955a1b97"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the button category element, redefine the </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">attributes that you want to modify with the needed values.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="c9b8f189-771e-499e-9df4-66ca2910862e"><ac:rich-text-body><p>All button categories - inherited and custom ones - inherit all the same button category attributes from <em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Components::AbstractItem</em> and <em>ItemsCategory</em>, which are: <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><em>isCollapsed</em>, <em>hasVisibleLabels</em>, <em>label</em>, <em>description. </em></span>You can also find the attributes in the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Custom symbolic view definitions" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[General button categories table]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="6936a4fa-8aa7-4e8e-b2f5-8981a817faed"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="6e7b34c2-115e-43b3-8421-48a3c792679a"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">   </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modifying an inherited button category's attributes:</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">selectionCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">         </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;Selection&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modified category name</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">         </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isCollapsed</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">true</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;    </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// modified category default collapse state</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">       }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specifying a custom button category's attributes:</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">      </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">buttonCategories</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">         </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">isCollapsed</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">false</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// newly specified <em>isCollapsed</em> attribute <ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="42921599-9fc4-4ba2-9683-4573a31932d7">for the custom button category</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">         <u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span></u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">hasVisibleLabels</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">true</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// newly specified <em>hasVisibleLabels </em>attribute for the custom button category</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">         </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">label</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;Requirements&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// newly specified <em>label </em>attribute for the custom button category</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">         </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">description</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">default</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;Requirements&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// newly specified <em>description </em>attribute for the custom button category</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">      }  <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">   }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Managing buttons in button categories</h3><p>A button category can contain specific and/or menu buttons that contain specific buttons in its submenu. You can also specify one of the submenu buttons as the focused button that would be displayed as the default one for the menu button. Additionally, you can create templates for custom buttons, allowing you to add custom templated buttons to custom and/or inherited button categories.</p><p><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="diagram_palette_composition.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">The image displays the custom button category 'Requirements' that contains multiple category-specific buttons. 'requirement' (as well as 'software requirement' and 'constraint') is a menu button with submenu buttons. <br />The 'requirement' button is displayed as the default one for the menu button.   </h6><h4>Creating menu buttons in button categories</h4><p>To create menu buttons in button categories</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="6f33e257-f9f8-46c6-966a-1c1d4922e8ec"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the button category element<em>.</em></span></li><li data-uuid="2344ba37-21a9-48b5-9ffc-40ba6f212bda"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name, define it by <em>ButtonsCategory,</em> and then subset <em>abstractButtons</em>.</span></li><li data-uuid="1396b09d-d41b-488b-9044-9ceb9eccd62a"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Add submenu buttons for the menu button:</span><ol><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Adding predefined buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Add predefined buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Adding custom templated buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Add custom templated buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="8655d7e0-07ed-4bbb-8a28-4fe20779279b"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">(Optional) Specify the focused button:</span><ol><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Redefine <em>focusedButton</em>, and specify the focused button by indicating the name of the needed button's part element.</span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="f839d494-71ce-4664-9010-27a6f4cf169b"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f1537f3f-a98a-46e1-a374-d9ff0430a2c4"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3">view</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3"> </ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3">def</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3"> </ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3">'Requirements View'</ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></ac:inline-comment-marker></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="7244ea5a-04f7-41a9-a5ff-849321f916b3"> {</ac:inline-comment-marker>  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">buttonCategories {</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            <u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButtonMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">ButtonsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// menu button instance</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// submenu button</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                   </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers::</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">}<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqDefButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// submenu button</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                   </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers::</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementDefAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">focusedButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the part <em>reqButton</em> is specified as the focused (default) button for the menu button</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">            }<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        </span>}<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Adding predefined buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To add predefined buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="798a093a-2dfc-49f7-aa72-b127d3dfcc90"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Do one of the following:</span><ol><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create specific buttons, place the cursor within the body of the button category element.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create submenu buttons for the menu button, place the cursor within the body of the menu button element.</span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="e6838d37-0673-4e38-a635-39a9c3571768"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name, define it by <em>Button,</em> and then subset <em>abstractButtons</em>.</span></li><li data-uuid="dd93da71-8319-4ab0-a88c-0d5de5fbcf0a"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the body of the part, declare a perform action, define it by <em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode,</em> and subset <em>operation</em>. In the element's body, specify the <em>in </em>direction with the code action identifier based on the type of element you want the button to create.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="4e708d33-f72a-43a5-85a8-bcd1726056f7"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">You can find the needed code action identifier for the element kind you want the button to create in the <em>DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers </em>package. It looks like this:</span></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="af09b53e-7006-4b7c-ae25-54b51460f1c4"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> <u>requirementAction</u> : ScalarValues::</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">String</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;ADD_REQUIREMENT&quot;</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the code action identifier for the requirement usage element button is <em>requirementAction</em></span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="44da7ad2-4ae1-4e98-ad5c-c0420d6fe627"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="5416c1a6-5e95-48fb-ad8c-a91861db15b7"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">buttonCategories {</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButtonMenu</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">ButtonsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// menu button instance</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// submenu button</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">::requirementAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><u>}</u> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specifies <em>requirementAction</em> so that this button creates the requirement usage element</span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqDefButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">abstractButtons</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// submenu button</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                   </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromCode</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">operation</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= DS_Views::ViewPalettes::CodeActionIdentifiers</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">::requirementDefAction</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><u> }</u> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specifies <em>requirementDefAction</em> so that this button creates the requirement definition element</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                }</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">focusedButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">reqButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">            }<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        </span>}<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Removing buttons from inherited button categories</h4><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To remove buttons from inherited button categories</span></p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="902b8cc6-eecb-4f0c-9337-44500b21132b"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Place the cursor within the body of the element redefining <em>baseViewPalette.</em></span></li><li data-uuid="6bd2c65f-2884-4658-9f50-7d9e2052ae66"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name (optional), and then redefine the button you want to remove.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="3903535b-6e24-4815-9163-6cb18094d7f7"><ac:rich-text-body><p>See the buttons specified for each predefined button category in the <em>DS_Views::ViewPalettes </em>package. You can also find it in the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Custom symbolic view definitions" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[General button categories table]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="0282f6df-90f4-4461-96ce-de99f9feadcf">Set the redefining button's multiplicity to zero.</li><li data-uuid="96196d77-079f-4f62-b2b1-c554ae6583f1"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="3cd28ca7-d84f-4290-9115-13b4b43631b0"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bsv</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {     <br /></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        <u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">selectionCategory</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// unnamed part redefines <em>selectionCategory </em>inherited via <em>baseViewPalette<br /></em></span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span>// ------ predefined button:<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> completeCoverageModeButton : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Palette::Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt; abstractButtons</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span>// ------ modified button (instead of the notation above):<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">completeCoverageModeButton</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">]</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// multiplicity for the button <em>completeCoverageModeButton </em>is set to zero to remove it <br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">        }</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Managing custom templated buttons in button categories</h3><p>Instead of or in addition to using predefined buttons either by adding them to your custom or inherited button categories, you can also create your own custom buttons. For that, first, you need to create a template for the custom button, and then you can add it to a specific button category of the view palette.</p><h4>Creating templates for custom buttons</h4><p>The following procedure depicts how to create an element template using metadata to extend the requirement usage element with the needed attribute, where the requirement usage element is named <em>Software</em>. Then the template can be passed into the custom button specification using <em>metadataAccessExpression</em>.</p><p>To create templates for custom buttons</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="0bf60361-15e1-4da8-b083-71df384cadc5"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Within the package containing the new symbolic view definition, d</span>eclare:<ol><li>A metadata definition element with the needed name and attributes.</li><li>A package element for the template.<ol><li>Within the template element, apply metadata to the element kind you want to extend and specify the element name.</li></ol></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="51d64110-b801-4fc6-b635-cfa8d960f032"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="4d851252-4084-4bd9-881c-43906052cabc"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Custom <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">symbolic view definitions</span>' {</span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    <u>metadata</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Software</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {   <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// declared metadata definition with the needed attribute</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">verificationMethod</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> [</span><span style="color:var(--ds-background-accent-green-bolder,#1f845a);">0</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">..*] : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">VerificationMethod</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;    </span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    </span>}</span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">package</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">softwareReqTemplate</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// custom button template </span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    </span><u>#Software </u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">requirement</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">softwareRequirement</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// the metadata <em>Software </em>is applied to the requirement usage element extending it with a new name <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><em>Software </em></span>and a metadata attribute. The name <em>softwareRequirement </em>will be used for the perform action's element specification to pass the template to a button in a button category</span><br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    </span>}</p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h4>Adding custom templated buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</h4><p>To add custom templated buttons to custom or inherited button categories or menu buttons</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="206bc5d2-12d8-4dd9-941a-4f5f8e0e9135"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Do one of the following:</span><ol><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create specific buttons, place the cursor within the body of the button category element.</span></li><li><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">To create submenu buttons for the menu button, place the cursor within the body of the menu button element.</span></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="7f62bb4f-7972-4b21-a900-e7be766395af"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a part usage, specify the element name, define it by <em>Button,</em> and then subset <em>abstractButtons</em>.</span></li><li data-uuid="6351dae3-0a87-45ea-a9fa-6785cb3c8a46">Within the body of the part, specify attributes for the custom templated button:<ol><li>Redefine the <em>label </em>attribute and specify the button name.</li><li>Redefine the <em>description </em>attribute and specify the button's tooltip.</li></ol></li><li data-uuid="8c22f25b-b810-4fa4-a18d-df3b363d6074"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Declare a perform action, define it by <em>DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromTemplate,</em> and subset <em>operation</em>. In the element's body, specify the <em>in</em> direction with the custom button's template path using <em><ac:inline-comment-marker ac:ref="d40d3f19-b0de-4004-86f4-ec8dd47a2d91">metadataAccessExpression</ac:inline-comment-marker></em></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">.</span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="1e790f45-acbd-4ae4-9804-3b003288f71f"><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li data-uuid="81793605-8ff4-4b65-8d61-6a3030ae223f">A <em>metadataAccessExpression</em> must be used for the <em>in </em>element. Its result must be exactly one templated element that you want to copy for the button.</li><li data-uuid="59a93276-a863-4109-a786-edc0afdbacc0"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Alternatively, you can also use metaclassification expressions, e.g., when the templated element is unnamed. The expression would be: <em>(</em></span><em><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">softwareReqTemplate meta KerML::Element).ownedElement</span></em></li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li><li data-uuid="d50012bc-6004-41c4-9383-27816d47e32b"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button.</span></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="ea7bfedb-8e7a-4311-89bc-89384b2a61bc"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'Requirements View'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::</span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">bsv</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);"><br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">    part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">baseViewPalette</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> {    <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        part</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">requirementsCategory</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);">buttonCategories {</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">            </span><u>part</u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span>softwareButton<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> : </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">Button</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span>abstractButtons</u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// menu button instance </span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span>label<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;software requirement&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specify the button name</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">attribute</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt;&gt; </span>description<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> = </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-red,#ae2e24);">&quot;software requirement&quot;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">;  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// specify the button tooltip</span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">                </span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">perform</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">action</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">: </span></u></span><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_UIComponents::CoreUIComponents::Operations::OperationFromTemplate </span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">:&gt; </span>operation<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> { </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">in</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">= </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">softwareReqTemplate::softwareRequirement . </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">metadata</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"><u>; }</u>  <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// <em>OperationFromTemplate </em>specifies that the indicated button is templated; <em>in</em><em> </em>specifies the created element, which is <em>softwareRequirement </em>(which also contains metadata)<em> </em>from the template <em>softwareReqTemplate </em></span></span><br /><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">            }<br /></span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue-bolder,#09326c);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">        </span>}<br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">    }<br />}</span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p>

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=254423122 space=SYSML2P version=4 -->
## PAGE 00290: (2026x) Creating custom tabular view definitions

- page_id: `254423122`
- space_key: `SYSML2P`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/SYSML2P/pages/254423122/2026x+Creating+custom+tabular+view+definitions
- version_number: 4
- version_date: `2026-01-08T12:11:42.091+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > (2026x) SysML v2 Plugin Documentation > (2026x) Model composition > (2026x) Views > (2026x) Creating views > (2026x) Creating tabular views > (2026x) Custom tabular view definitions
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

Instead of, or in addition to, using the predefined tabular view definitions, you can create model-based custom tabular view definitions as part of your projects.There are two ways you can do that:

- Reuse predefined or custom tabular view definitions
- Create new customized tabular view definitions from scratch

You can customize the new view definitions to have specific tabular columns. Afterward, you can create individual view usages defined by the newly created tabular view definitions.

#### Creating custom tabular view definitions

##### Creating a custom tabular view definition

To create a custom tabular view definition

1. In the Containment tree, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) Managing elements' space=''] .
2. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) Managing Textual Editor' space=''] for the new namespace.
3. In the Textual Editor, [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) Package' space=''] and name it.
4. Do one of the following:
  1. To create a new custom tabular view definition from scratch:
    1. Within the body of the package, declare a view definition, specify its name, and subclassify the Base Table view definition from the DS_Views::CoreViews package.
  2. To create a new custom tabular view definition by reusing an existing tabular view definition (predefined or custom):
    1. Within the body of the package, declare a view definition, specify its name, and subclassify the needed tabular view definition.
5. Click the Synchronize button. Proceed to . The new view definition becomes available in theonce you:1. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) Creating View Creation dialog' space=''].2. Add the[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) Creating View Creation dialog' space='']. This requires you to .

// ---------- new view definition from scratch:

viewdefVariantTable:>DS_Views::CoreViews::bt// new tabular view definition *VariantTable* based on the *Base Table*abstract view definition**

// ---------- new view definition reusing an existing view definition:

viewdef'System Behavior Table':>DS_Views::TabularViews::gt;// new tabular view definition *'System Behavior Table'* that reuses the tabular view definition *Generic Table*

##### Modeling table columns

Once you have created the new tabular view definitions, you can model their columns. The procedures for tabular columns modeling are the same for both view definitions and view usages. Thus, see the procedures on the [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='(2026x) Modeling tabular view columns' space=''] page.

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

````html
<p style="text-align: left;"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Instead of, or in addition to, using the predefined tabular view definitions, you can create model-based custom tabular view definitions as part of your projects.<span> There are two ways you can do that:</span></span></p><ul><li style="text-align: left;" data-uuid="fd06256e-777f-46eb-bad8-13d1fc5bdb71"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Reuse predefined or custom tabular view definitions </span></li><li style="text-align: left;" data-uuid="f08f5169-cf4d-47c4-aa06-903854e1a2ff"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Create new customized tabular view definitions from scratch</span></li></ul><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">You can customize the new view definitions to have specific tabular columns. Afterward, you can create individual view usages defined by the newly created tabular view definitions. </span></span></p><h2>Creating custom tabular view definitions</h2><h3>Creating a custom tabular view definition</h3><p>To create a custom tabular view definition</p><hr /><ol><li data-uuid="e269b7e6-869d-4603-bb16-bc8e59d9a1a6">In the Containment tree,<span> </span><ac:link ac:anchor="Declaring a root namespace"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Managing elements" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[create a new root namespace]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</li><li data-uuid="f454dffa-6f45-4eaf-997e-b0555bfc71af"><ac:link ac:anchor="Opening the Textual Editor"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Managing Textual Editor" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Open the Textual Editor]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><span> </span>for the new namespace.</li><li data-uuid="7ce82af4-a3a9-4b92-b427-fd2d48726821">In the Textual Editor,<span> </span><ac:link ac:anchor="Creating a package element via the Textual Editor"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Package" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[create a package]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><span> </span>and name it.</li><li data-uuid="fcbc08c3-bd35-465b-9ed7-fadbe1e5c221">Do one of the following:<ol><li data-uuid="f91c1712-5571-4c4d-ab1a-49a6a86d40e3">To create a new custom tabular view definition from scratch:<ol><li data-uuid="1a5b5817-fbc7-4012-91bc-f3c46bf4b6c4">Within the body of the package, declare a view definition, specify its name, and subclassify the <em>Base Table</em> view definition from the <em>DS_Views::CoreViews </em>package.</li></ol></li><li>To create a new custom tabular view definition by reusing an existing tabular view definition (predefined or custom):<ol><li data-uuid="9ed723d9-5ce1-4733-8d75-0e700683fdb1">Within the body of the package, declare a view definition, specify its name, and subclassify the needed tabular view definition.</li></ol></li></ol></li><li data-uuid="8cc8d328-6bdb-4d6c-9799-97e4b035d2b9"><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">Click the<span> </span></span><strong style="text-align: left;">Synchronize<span> </span></strong><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">button. Proceed to <ac:link ac:anchor="Redefining the inherited renderer"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[redefine the inherited renderer]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.<br /></span><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="954b0db7-4aeb-4978-8a86-cfa4c049770e"><ac:rich-text-body><p>The new view definition becomes available <span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">in the<span> </span></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[View Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> once you:</span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">1. <ac:link ac:anchor="Creating view templates for custom templated commands"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Creating View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Create a view template for a custom templated command]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. <br /></span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);">2. Add the </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#172b4d);"><ac:link ac:anchor="Adding commands to the View Creation dialog/submenu command categories"><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Creating View Creation dialog" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[custom templated command to the View Creation dialog/submenu]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. This requires you to <ac:link><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[customize or create a View Creation dialog customization]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>. </span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro></li></ol><ac:structured-macro ac:name="panel" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="30e64319-8c5d-4944-ba04-1de829c1e064"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// ---------- new view definition from scratch:</span></span></p><p><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">VariantTable</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::CoreViews::bt</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new tabular view definition <em>VariantTable</em> based on the <em>Base Table </em>abstract view definition<em> </em></span></span></p><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);"><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// ---------- new view definition reusing an existing view definition:</span></span></p><p><u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">view</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-blue,#0055cc);">def</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">'System Behavior Table'</span><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> :&gt; </span><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);">DS_Views::TabularViews::gt;</span></u><span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-teal,#206a83);"> <span style="color:var(--ds-text-accent-green-bolder,#164b35);">// new tabular view definition <em>'System Behavior Table'</em> that reuses the tabular view definition <em>Generic Table </em></span></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3>Modeling table columns</h3><p>Once you have created the new tabular view definitions, you can model their columns. The procedures for tabular columns modeling are the same for both view definitions and view usages. Thus, see the procedures on the <ac:link><ri:page ri:content-title="(2026x) Modeling tabular view columns" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Modeling tabular view columns]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link> page.</p>
````
